name: Emma Hubbs Tennis Courts
description: Emma Hubbs Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Dixon, IL. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Meadows Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Meadows Pickleball Courts in Dixon, IL! There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Terry Nichols Pickleball Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Terry Nichols Pickleball Complex in Dixon, IL! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.
